title: Orchestration Lifetime Totals (v1)
description: Project-scoped cumulative per-backend delegation totals, accumulated across sessions by scripts/orchestration-rollup.sh. Each rollup reconciles a session's contribution by the delta between its current ledger count and the amount already folded in (session_counts), so completion + session-end + re-runs — even mid-session — add each delegation exactly once: no new delegations is a no-op, a grown ledger adds only the tail. Record-only; the scorecard reads this for the lifetime figure.

totals.description: Cumulative count of counted delegations per backend across all rolled-up sessions.

rolled_up_sessions.description: Session ids that have been folded into totals at least once. Used together with session_counts to reconcile a session by delta on re-rollup; for a pre-reconciliation file a member with no session_counts entry is treated as already fully counted (delta 0).

session_counts.description: Per-session snapshot of the per-backend amounts already folded into totals. On re-rollup the script adds only (current ledger count − this snapshot) per backend, then overwrites the snapshot with the current count — so a session whose ledger grew after an earlier (e.g. mid-session) rollup is reconciled without double-counting. Additive in v1: absent in pre-reconciliation files and read as {}; not required.

first_seen.description: UTC timestamp of the first rollup (ISO 8601). Null before any rollup.

last_seen.description: UTC timestamp of the most recent rollup (ISO 8601).
